tool.name: Gamma
tool.shortDescription: AI presentation and document creator that turns notes into polished slides
tool.description: Gamma turns notes into presentations, documents, and simple webpages. It's designed for quick, polished output without manual design work. Ideal for pitch decks, reports, and visual communication.
pros: Good for pitch decks and reports
cons: Free tier has strict AI credit limits
Export options limited on lower tiers
tool.bestFor: Pitch decks, reports, presentations, and quick visual communication

relatedTools.name: NotebookLM
relatedTools.shortDescription: Google's AI note-taker that answers questions using your own documents
relatedTools.description: NotebookLM helps you understand and organize large amounts of information. You upload notes, PDFs, or course materials, and it summarizes them, answers questions, and generates podcast-style audio recaps. Ideal for studying, research, and reviewing dense material.
cons: Usage limits on free plan (queries, audio summaries)
relatedTools.bestFor: Studying for exams, reviewing research papers, summarizing long documents, preparing reports, organizing project materials, and getting up to speed on dense topics

relatedTools.name: Fathom
relatedTools.shortDescription: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings
relatedTools.description: Fathom records meetings and produces summaries, transcripts, and action items. It integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Ideal for keeping track of decisions and follow-ups without manual note-taking.
features: Integration with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams
relatedTools.bestFor: Recording meetings, generating summaries, tracking action items, and keeping meeting history searchable
